name: libparams-util-perl
title: libparams-util-perl
summary: Perl extension for simple stand-alone param checking functions
description:
Perl extension for simple stand-alone param checking functions
Params::Util provides a basic set of importable functions that makes checking
parameters easier. The functions provided by Params::Util check in the most
strictly correct manner, and it should not be fooled by odd cases.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libparams-util-perl because Perl extension for simple stand-alone param checking functions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libparams-util-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libparams-util-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libparams-util-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
